title: Saththam Ilaatha Thanimai Kaetten Lyrics Amarkalam

Saththam Ilaatha Thanimai Kaetten Song Lyrics Amarkalam
#Bharathwaj #SPB #SujathaMohan #Vairamuthu #Ajith

Satham illatha thanimai kaeten

ragasiyamilla ullam kaetten (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of loneliness and the struggles of navigating a world without companionship, reflecting deep emotional turmoil.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Amarkalam, which explores themes of love and sacrifice.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Sujatha Mohan, known for her expressive vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Saththam Ilaatha Thanimai Kaetten was composed by Bharadwaj, who is celebrated for his melodious tunes.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 13, 1999, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Saththam Ilaatha Thanimai Kaetten, the protagonist grapples with feelings of isolation and longing, beautifully conveyed through the haunting lyrics. The song serves as a poignant reflection of heartbreak, encapsulating the emotional struggles faced in love. With Sujatha Mohan's mesmerizing voice, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. This melody resonates with anyone who has felt the weight of solitude, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saththam Ilaatha Thanimai Kaetten from Amarkalam is a poignant melody that captures the essence of solitude and longing. With Sujatha Mohan's soulful voice and Bharadwaj's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced heartache. Dive into the emotional depths of this classic and let its haunting lyrics linger in your heart.
stanzaMeanings: I feel the silence of loneliness, a world without battles. I feel the rush of blood always, and my heart has no secrets.
I feel the silence of loneliness, a world without battles. I feel the rush of blood always, and my heart has no secrets.
I feel the bond that doesn't take life, I feel the tears that flow. I feel the words that don't get spoken, and I feel a life that is right.
I feel the cloud that has no rain, I feel the joy that doesn't fade. I feel the love that flies away, and I feel the love that doesn't exist.
I feel the dew on the grass, I feel the rest in the flower's shade. I feel the eyes that will sleep, and I feel the hand that gives.
I feel the shade in the moonlight, I feel the song of the blue cuckoo. I feel the path that goes beyond, and I feel the rolling of the earth.
I feel the state of being touched, I feel the beauty of the stars. I feel the pain that forgets, and I feel the dream that brings rest.
I feel the day on the earth, I feel the life in the flowers. I feel the heart in all humans, and I feel the words in the birds.
I feel the rain for the world, I feel the river for the town. I feel the state of being in the sky, and I feel the heaven when I live.
I feel everything rising, I feel the burning fire of poetry. I feel the knowledge that flows with tears, and I feel the union that comes with desire.
I feel the freedom of the wandering wind, I feel the wings of the little bird. I feel the rain that falls on the earth, and I feel the river in the valleys.
I feel the song of the working people, I feel the sky that is flying. I feel the friendship that doesn't fade, and I feel the wealth that doesn't move.
I feel a day in the flower, I feel the music of the rain. I feel the river in the moonlight, and I feel the fragrance in my thoughts.
I feel like a shadow when I fall, I feel like rain when I cry. I feel the solitude in my life, and I feel the smiles that are always there.
I feel a sun like dew, and I feel dew like a sun.
I feel the life of the king, I feel the words written by the poet. I feel the words of Bharathiyar, and I feel the flute of the magician.
I feel the love that is caught in the embrace, I feel the rain that falls. I feel the work that is done by the child, and I feel the storm that is born from the wind.
I feel the heart that can bear the burden, I feel the strength that can endure. I feel the patience that doesn't fade, and I feel the heart that listens to the words.
I feel the speed that comes with the words, I feel the eyes that know the truth. I feel the time that passes, and I feel the little troubles that come quickly.

I feel the faces that are not finished, I feel the smile that is not sweet. I feel the pain in the age, and I feel the dolls in the age. I feel the books in five ages, and I feel the girl who is not a burden.
I feel the mother who is not needed, I feel the life that is like a basket. I feel the love that has decreased.
I feel that nothing can be gained from this, I feel that nothing happens here. I feel that life should not be lived, and I feel that death is death is death.
